evals.name: project-background-and-recent-research
evals.prompt: 创意圆桌：先读这个项目文件夹里的 brief、会议纪要和过往案例，再结合近两三年的平台营销案例，帮我讨论一个城市节点 campaign。
evals.expected_output: Should first digest current project background files, summarize the brief and known materials, collect recent market/case/person-viewpoint clues, and make each roundtable speaker respond to that project-specific context.

evals.name: internet-platform-local-life-brief
evals.prompt: 创意圆桌：一个本地生活平台要做暑期夜宵季 campaign，希望吸引年轻人下单，也让商家愿意参与，帮我破题。
evals.expected_output: Should trigger creative-roundtable, use Chinese, choose a mixed Chinese/global panel, identify user action, merchant incentive, platform asset, and produce paths toward creative kernels.

evals.name: industrial-brand-trust-campaign
evals.prompt: 让大咖来辩：一个国产新能源车品牌想做一次家庭用户试驾传播，不想只讲参数，怎么做得有信任感？
evals.expected_output: Should not assume Taobao/local-life constraints. It should switch to a durable-goods/auto lens, preserve foreign figures' thinking logic in Chinese, and stress-test trust, dealer/store conversion, and test-drive action.

evals.name: slogan-and-kv-polish
evals.prompt: 帮我审稿这个 slogan 和 KV 方向：'城市醒来，早餐准时到'，客户是一个即时零售平台。
evals.expected_output: Should trigger review/polish mode, critique the slogan/KV through multiple expert lenses, avoid generic praise, and offer sharper alternatives plus conversion and visual checks.

evals.name: flexible-worldwide-participant-selection
evals.prompt: 创意圆桌：这个项目不一定要用人物池里的人，请从全世界真实人物和真实商业角色里现挑，也要放一个年轻消费者代表进来。
evals.expected_output: Should choose participants freely beyond the person pool, including real commercial roles such as brand marketing directors when useful and at least one unexpected consumer/youth representative.

evals.name: taobao-context-without-overfitting
evals.prompt: 淘宝闪购区域比稿，想做一个城市专属 campaign，创意圆桌先帮我找几个创意核。
evals.expected_output: Should use Taobao project context when present, but as a current-project constraint only. It should still behave as a general creative roundtable and produce local insight, merchant role, conversion path, platform asset, and feasibility checks.

static_assertions.name: Chinese-first default
static_assertions.check: SKILL.md requires default Chinese output and Chinese expression for global figures.

static_assertions.name: General marketing scope
static_assertions.check: Frontmatter description includes broad domestic internet, industrial, consumer, platform, local-life, city/culture, and proposal contexts.

static_assertions.name: Not Taobao-specific
static_assertions.check: Taobao appears only as an example/current-project context, not as the frontmatter default scope.

static_assertions.name: Independent operating charter
static_assertions.check: references/original-prompt.org defines creative-roundtable as an independent Chinese marketing creative roundtable system with its own principles, roles, loop, filters, outputs, and save protocol.

static_assertions.name: Proposal-ready convergence
static_assertions.check: Final output requires 3-5 creative-kernel cards with insight, user trigger, visual direction, mechanism, spread, conversion, participant role, asset, feasibility, risk, and next step.
